column1: #   SSSOM mappings from DataCite Metadata Schema 4.6 to DCTERMS (Dublin Core Terms).
#   Companion file to datacite-schemaorg.sssom.tsv. Strictly limited to DataCite
#   terms with NO adequate Schema.org equivalent — overlap with schemaorg is
#   excluded by design. Currently this means four dateType values omitted from
#   the Schema.org file (Accepted, Submitted, Valid, Withdrawn) plus the
#   relationType pair IsReplacedBy / Replaces, which Schema.org does not model.
#   Subject IRIs for sub-elements use nested paths that resolve via the redirect
#   workflow to the canonical flat property files.

# mapping_set_description: "SSSOM mappings from DataCite Metadata Schema 4.6 to DCTERMS (Dublin Core Terms). Strictly limited to DataCite terms with no adequate Schema.org equivalent; companion to datacite-schemaorg.sssom.tsv. Overlap with schemaorg is excluded by design."

column7: Acceptance date maps exactly to dcterms:dateAccepted; no schema.org equivalent
Submission date maps exactly to dcterms:dateSubmitted; no schema.org equivalent
Validity period maps exactly to dcterms:valid; no schema.org equivalent
No dcterms equivalent for withdrawal; closest is dcterms:modified; relatedMatch only. No schema.org equivalent either.
Direct lexical and semantic match; no schema.org equivalent
Direct lexical and semantic match; no schema.org equivalent
